title: 10 best herbal tinctures for chickenpox
description: Aloe tinctures helps with chickenpox because of its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and soothing properties. The aloe vera gel has been traditionally used to treat skin irritations and wounds, making it an effective natural remedy for relieving the itching and discomfort associated with chickenpox.
